response.overview: Just before a live performance, drummer Kyosuke Amano (25) receives a phone call from his mother informing him of his father's accident. Still shaken, he takes to the stage but leaves the venue without starting to play. Later, while spending time idly in his room, he is confronted with the reality that none of the performance videos he has been sending to his father have ever been seen. One evening, as if responding to the rhythm he was unconsciously keeping, a figure in a spacesuit appears. Led by this figure, Kyosuke steps into a spaceship. Inside, he is led to a place that seems to connect him to past memories, where he meets his father in his youth.
